prompt: A polished Japanese promotional poster for a community and sustainability project called セカイムラ, designed like a premium eco-lifestyle campaign flyer. Vertical layout, clean and elegant, with a soft cream paper background and a luminous, aspirational mood. The top half is dominated by a giant translucent globe centered in the composition, glowing with warm sunrise light from the upper right. Inside the globe is a breathtaking aerial landscape of a green mountain valley opening to a calm blue bay or lake, with tiny villages and fields below, cinematic and utopian. Over the globe, place a smaller Japanese slogan line reading 世界は1つの村になる。 and beneath it the large main title in bold dark navy Japanese calligraphic lettering: セカイムラ. Around the globe, create a collage of exactly 8 candid lifestyle photos fading into the edges: 1) top left, two people in conversation outdoors under trees; 2) upper left-mid, several people working together in a rice paddy; 3) left middle, a circle gathering inside a rustic wooden structure at night; 4) lower left, two portrait-style figures in nature; 5) top right, a group sharing a meal at a long table in warm indoor light; 6) right middle, a person tending plants or crops; 7) right lower-mid, a line of people holding hands on a ridge at sunset; 8) lower right, a close portrait of a person eating or holding food. The photographic style should feel human, communal, slightly idealized, with soft depth of field, natural skin tones, golden-hour highlights, and smooth ad-poster compositing. The bottom half contains 3 evenly spaced feature cards on a light cream background, separated by subtle vertical dividers. Card 1 on the left has the heading "セカイムラ 新月会" in dark blue, a circular photo of a nighttime campfire circle, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Card 2 in the center has the heading "セカイムラ 満月会" in warm gold, a circular photo of an indoor evening gathering under string lights, decorative radiating sunburst lines around the circle, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Card 3 on the right has the heading "セカイムラ 米部が今の一押し" in green, small rice plant illustrations near the title, a circular photo of a wooden bowl of white rice, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Under these cards, add a centered Japanese statement line in dark blue: 人・自然・文化がつながり、循環する未来を一緒につくる。. Beneath that, place 4 small icon-and-text items in a horizontal row, each with a simple thin-line icon and two-line Japanese label: 1) people icon with "つながる 仲間と出会える"; 2) house icon with "まなぶ 暮らしを学べる"; 3) sprout icon with "つくる 未来を共につくる"; 4) globe icon with "ひろがる 世界にひろげる". At the very bottom center, include a circular logo mark followed by the project name in Japanese, and underneath a website URL: www.sekaimura.com. Add a small QR code at the bottom right with tiny Japanese text indicating details are on the website. Use a refined palette of deep navy, forest green, gold, cream, and sky blue. Overall style: high-end Japanese nonprofit poster, eco-community branding, inspirational, harmonious, photoreal collage with subtle graphic design elements, balanced typography, soft glows, and magazine-quality print finish.
